")

Bash(python -c "
import duckdb
con = duckdb.connect\('data/attend.duckdb'\)
rows = con.execute\(\\"SELECT DISTINCT day FROM attend ORDER BY day\\"\).fetchall\(\)
print\([r[0] for r in rows]\)
con.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import duckdb
con = duckdb.connect\('data/attend.duckdb'\)
rows = con.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\), date, day FROM attend WHERE date='23-Mar' GROUP BY date, day\\"\).fetchall\(\)
print\(rows\)
con.close\(\)
")
